overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy depicting a Slytherin student exploring the house common room and dormitory. The character traverses the gothic underground chambers with green ambient lighting, ascends a spiral staircase, walks through a corridor with stained glass ceilings, and enters the circular dormitory with a large domed skylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: Slytherin common room lounge with sofas and fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the common room past seated students and ornate furniture

notable_agents.action: student sitting on the leather sofa reading a book

entered.detail: large gothic stone fireplace with burning fire and ornate mantel
dark brown leather sofa with students seated
intricate green and gold patterned carpet covering the stone floor
tall gothic stone archway leading to upper levels

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the Slytherin common room lounge, a spacious underground chamber with gothic stone architecture. A large fireplace burns to the right while students relax on leather sofas. The floor is covered with ornate patterned carpets, and wall sconces provide warm lighting against the green-tinged stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase connecting common room levels

events.description: character reaches the top landing, turns around, and begins descending the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbs the spiral staircase to the upper landing, pauses, then turns and walks back down toward the corridor entrance

entered.detail: stone spiral staircase with ornate railings leading upward
large decorative tapestry hanging on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the spiral staircase at the edge of the common room, reaching a small landing with a stained glass window above, then turns and descends back to the main level. The narrow stone stairwell is lit by wall sconces, and tapestries adorn the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: underwater-themed corridor with green stained glass ceiling

events.description: enters the long corridor from the common room, passing under a stone archway

agents.ego_description: walking down the long corridor toward the distant doorway, passing under the green-tinted glass ceiling

entered.detail: arched ceiling with green stained glass panels creating an underwater ambiance
ornate black iron railing along the left side of the corridor
ornate black iron railing along the right side of the corridor
heavy wooden door with metal studs at the far end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a long, narrow corridor illuminated by eerie green light filtering through the stained glass ceiling, creating an underwater atmosphere. Iron railings line both sides of the patterned marble floor, and wall sconces cast warm light against the stone walls as the character approaches the wooden door at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: Slytherin boys dormitory with canopy beds and domed skylight

events.description: opens the wooden door and enters the circular dormitory room
character stops walking and looks up at the stained glass dome ceiling

agents.ego_description: enters the dormitory, pauses to admire the stained glass ceiling, then continues exploring the room and approaching the beds

notable_agents.action: student sitting on the edge of a canopy bed

entered.detail: large circular stained glass dome ceiling with intricate blue and green patterns
four-poster bed with green velvet curtains and wooden frame
four-poster bed with green velvet curtains and wooden frame
ornate metal cage structure with glowing embers in the center of the room

segments.scene_description: The character enters the circular dormitory, a grand chamber with a magnificent stained glass dome ceiling filtering ethereal green light. Canopy beds with green curtains line the walls, and a central metal heater glows warmly. The character pauses to look up at the intricate ceiling design before continuing to explore the room where other students rest on their beds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the subterranean depths of the Slytherin common room, transitioning from a cozy lounge into a grand, ethereal dormitory. It begins by gliding through a spacious gothic chamber where a burning fireplace and leather sofas contrast with the green-tinged stone walls. As the camera ascends a narrow spiral staircase and returns to the main level, the scene shifts into a long, narrow corridor where light filters through a stained glass ceiling to create an underwater atmosphere. The movement then carries through a wooden door, opening into a circular dormitory dominated by a magnificent domed skylight that bathes the canopy beds in ethereal green light. Finally, the camera pauses to gaze up at the intricate ceiling design before panning across the room where students rest.
